microsoft_ft: **Architected and deployed** Azure's Resilience Automation Platform from 0→1, defining self-service scheduling and integration specs that cut operational toil by 30% and scaled the program to **45+ annual drills**.

Owned end-to-end technical partnerships with enterprise customers — Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp — designing deployment strategies fit to each architecture and driving **$14M+ in business impact**.

Pioneered Azure's first rack-level proactive resilience drill, delivering a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months by pairing with core engineering to surface hardware defects and establish a continuous validation playbook.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ contract**, owning the technical relationship with engineering leadership through scoping, execution, and rollout.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing deployment capacity by 21% — directly informing the team's forward tooling roadmap.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI-driven code generation** adoption across 14 Azure engineering teams, running hands-on demos and integration sessions that saved 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerated developer workflow rollout.

Shaped the product roadmap by conducting **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps that led to intent-based YAML generation being prioritized as a core capability.
Cut documentation lookup time by **83%** by migrating to an AI-powered semantic search tool and enforcing metadata standards — improving retrieval quality for engineering teams at scale.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch time by 28% by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ engineering teams.

Ran discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, translating findings into a phased roadmap that automated critical deployment paths and reduced rollout friction.
Built a **Power BI deployment dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership a real-time view to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact engineering investment.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and sequencing rollout to protect production continuity.

Drove cross-team alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to **ship automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and unblocking a stalled integration rollout.
Facilitated Agile sprint ceremonies and triaged **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and keeping the migration on schedule under tight delivery constraints.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, building a CRM workflow that standardized execution and cut turnaround time.
Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile for local search.

Surfaced margin leaks across **1,000+ project records** through financial profitability analysis, delivering pricing model recommendations that improved leadership's ability to scope and bid high-margin work.

skills_priority: Python, SQL, YAML, Power BI, Semantic Search, RAG
tailoring_notes: 'Architected and deployed' + 'deployment strategies fit to each architecture' in microsoft_ft bullets 1–2 mirrors JD language 'Architect and deploy at scale' and 'design implementation strategies that fit their systems'.

'Owns end-to-end technical partnerships' and 'bridge lead…owning the technical relationship with engineering leadership' in microsoft_ft bullets 2 and 4 directly echoes JD's 'Own the technical relationship and lead the pilot' and 'technical lead to engineering leadership (VPs Eng, Staff+ engineers)'.

'AI agent to automate drill planning workflows…informing the team's forward tooling playbook' in microsoft_ft bullet 5 mirrors JD's 'Build the playbook' and 'guide the direction of the product based on what you learn in the field'.

'AI-driven code generation adoption' in microsoft_2023 bullet 1 mirrors JD's core mission language around 'AI code generation' and surfaces Cyrus's direct experience accelerating engineering teams — the exact customer context Meticulous serves.
'Ship automated CI/CD pipelines' in amazon_robotics bullet 2 uses JD-adjacent deployment/shipping vocabulary and signals hands-on delivery ownership rather than coordination-only work.
